title: BI Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, pandas. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: CloudForge is hiring a junior bi analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V028: BI Analyst at CloudForge. Location: Lviv. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 0.7 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, pandas, statistics, airflow. Optional skills: forecasting, product analytics, ga4. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
